title: Meteorit [WB]
description: An entity that triggers a meteorite comes as a warning a sound impact and a large explosion animation and a forest fire.
body:
![Meteorit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33dd2aa111e6f865d9c2f2841e0bb16a8cff24b3.gif)

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae9df7cd4d76c4661a3cdf89b63f2e36ae6ada5_0.webp)

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/meteorit

There is an event that could randomly trigger a meteorite impact and cause a forest fire.
